problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: If Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
